overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night. The scene transitions from a covered pedestrian plaza with glowing columns to an open wet street with digital billboards, steam vents, and light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with neon columns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza, passing by neon-lit columns and advertisements

entered.detail: tall cylindrical columns glowing with pink neon light
large curved digital billboard displaying Splash Damage game advertisements
grid-patterned translucent roof with cyan lighting panels
storefronts with various neon signs and displays

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian plaza illuminated by pink neon columns. Large advertisements line the right wall while various NPCs walk through the reflective space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with advertisement screens transitioning to open road

events.description: exits covered pedestrian plaza into open city street with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: turning right along the building corner and approaching the open street

entered.detail: corner building wrapped in large digital screens showing Feel the Chemistry advertisements
purple neon hotel sign visible in the distance
reflective wet pavement showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered plaza onto a wet street corner covered in advertisements. The camera turns right along the building edge as the open road comes into view with distant digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with digital billboards and storefronts

events.description: steam rises from street vents near the sidewalk creating atmospheric effect

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing food vendors

entered.detail: tall building covered in massive digital advertisement screens
small shop front with bright red neon lighting and signage
street vent emitting steam that glows in the neon lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet reflective street with towering digital billboards ahead. A neon-lit food vendor sits on the left while sparse traffic passes on the right, and steam rises from street vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection approach with crosswalk signals

events.description: camera passes close to pedestrian with distinctive red mohawk and sunglasses

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk while walking behind a character with red hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk and reflective sunglasses walking ahead and turning slightly toward the camera

entered.detail: pedestrian crossing signal with yellow walk symbol illuminated
building entrance with HOTEL signage and Japanese characters underneath

segments.scene_description: Approaching a crosswalk with a pedestrian signal visible. The camera passes close to a distinctive character with a red mohawk and sunglasses. The street opens up to a larger intersection with hotel entrances and continued neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered neon plaza into the expansive, rain-slicked streets of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding through a covered pedestrian area illuminated by pink neon columns and reflective floors, passing by large advertisements and strolling NPCs. As the camera exits the plaza, the scene opens onto a wet street corner where the view expands to reveal distant digital billboards and the open road. The movement then continues along the reflective pavement, passing a neon-lit food vendor and rising steam vents while sparse traffic flows nearby. Finally, the camera approaches a crosswalk, passing a character with a red mohawk before the environment opens further into a large intersection filled with hotel entrances and towering signage.
